name: chain__sold_my_first_faceless_account_last_mon
method: sold my first faceless account last month for $47,000i built it in 11 weekslet me explain why this is the most underrated play in digital products right nowfaceless accounts sell for 30-40x monthly r

stages.task: Scrape Fameswap + SocialTradia for sold listings in target niches. Extract: niche, follower count, monthly revenue, sale price, days on market. Build comparable sales database.
Generate 90 days of niche content per account using claude -p. Format: short-form video scripts, carousel posts, quote graphics. Use existing content_multiplier.py and engagement_bait_converter.py.
Execute warmup protocol from WARMUP_DEVICE_MATRIX.csv. Ramp posting frequency. Cross-promote from other PRINTMAXX accounts. Track engagement rate daily.
Weekly: compute MRR from affiliate/sponsorship revenue. Apply 30-35x multiple. When account hits $10K+ estimated sale value, draft marketplace listing.
Create Fameswap/SocialTradia listing with analytics screenshots, revenue proof, growth trajectory. Set price at 32x trailing 3-month average MRR.
